title: IBKR Tax Calculator
description: A web application for calculating taxes from Interactive Brokers statements (CSV and HTML formats), tailored for Bulgarian users. All data is processed locally in the browser — no server storage, no tracking.

title: Djagi.com
description: A Bulgarian multiplayer browser games platform featuring 20+ games including Billiards, Belot, Chess, and Texas Hold'em. Worked as a full-stack developer from 2013 to 2018, contributing to the launch of multiple games and maintaining platform features, real-time multiplayer, and overall user experience.

title: Fashion Retail E-Commerce
description: Salesforce B2C Commerce (Demandware) storefront for a global fashion brand. Involved SFRA development, custom controllers, ISML templates, Business Manager configuration, and payment provider integrations.

title: Order Management & Commerce Integration
description: Integration between Salesforce Order Management and Salesforce B2C Commerce for a global retail client. Involved Apex development, API design, and data flow coordination across both platforms.

title: Automotive Dealership CRM
description: Custom Salesforce CRM solution for a major automotive dealership network. Involved Apex development, Lightning Web Components, and custom workflows to support dealership operations and customer management.

title: Media Group Ad Sales CRM
description: Salesforce CRM implementation for the advertising sales division of a major media group. Involved Apex development, Lightning Web Components, and custom workflows to support the ad sales process.

title: FMCG E-Commerce
description: Salesforce B2C Commerce (Demandware) storefront for a global consumer goods company. Included SFRA customization, Business Manager configurations, and third-party integrations.
